title: ConeData
description: Pipeline JSON consumed by blender_place_cones.py. Produced by detect_cones.py, detect_cones_pdf.py, or converted from ax-mapper editor JSON via convert_editor_json().

transform.description: Coordinate transform metadata. Used for chalk UV mapping and road sizing. All fields optional — Blender falls back to safe defaults when absent.

type.description: Discriminator written by detect_cones*.py. May be absent in editor-derived JSON.

scale.description: Metres per source unit (pixels or editor units). Default 0.3048 (1 ft/pt, SCCA PDF scale).

ax.description: Affine X row [a11, a12, tx]. Present only when type=affine.

ay.description: Affine Y row [a21, a22, ty]. Present only when type=affine.

page_w_pt.description: Full PDF page width in points. When present with page_h_pt, road is sized to the full page rather than cone extents.

page_h_pt.description: Full PDF page height in points.

bounds.description: Axis-aligned bounding box of all standing + pointer cone positions (metres). Optional — blender_place_cones.py recomputes from cone arrays if absent.

stage_cone_pos.description: Position and heading of the car-start marker group. Used to position the driver spawn marker. null or absent if no staging area.

facing_deg.description: Heading of the staged car (degrees CCW from +X in Blender world space). null or absent if direction was not set in the editor.

timing_start_gate.description: Explicit bar endpoints for the timing-start gate. When present, overrides cone-pair inference. null or absent if none.

timing_end_gate.description: Explicit bar endpoints for the timing-finish gate. When present, overrides cone-pair inference. null or absent if none.

pointers.description: Lying-flat pointer cone positions and orientations.

gcp.description: GCP (ground control point) positions for affine alignment in Blender. Exactly 3 entries activates the affine warp; 0 or absent means cones are placed from bx/by directly.

pointer_source.description: Which colour channel or method was used for pointer cone detection. Present only in detect_cones*.py output.

n_gcp.description: Count of GCP reference dots. Informational.

base_cone.description: Minimal cone entry — Blender world-space position, role, and source blob size.

size.description: Pixel area of the source blob at working resolution.

gcp_point.description: GCP reference position. Only bx/by are used by Blender; type and size are present when written by detect_cones.py but absent when converted from editor JSON.

pointer_cone.description: Lying-flat pointer cone with orientation and optional snap metadata.

size.description: Pixel area of source blob. Absent in editor-derived JSON.

facing_deg.description: Z-rotation (degrees, CCW from +X) so the pointer tip faces toward its standing cone. null if no standing cone was nearby.

nearest_standing_idx.description: Index into 'standing' of the closest standing cone.

snapped.description: True when position was snapped to a physically correct 3-inch increment from its standing cone.

snapped_to_timing.description: True when snapping anchor was a timing cone rather than a standing cone.

split_from.description: Number of sub-cones this entry was split from when an oversized fused blob was decomposed by PCA.

gate.description: A timing gate defined by two bar endpoints in Blender world-space.
